rationale: Keep: the cited paper is directly about estimating pre- and postpromotion dips with flexible dynamic lead-lag store-level models, and the citing paper explicitly models pre-, during-, and postpromotion effects and dynamic promotion responses in its own decomposition framework. This strong construct/method overlap (promotion dynamics and dip effects) makes the citation plausibly foundational/method-relevant rather than incidental, despite having only DOI-level matched reference evidence.
